commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=967cc13cbdf3ee3e53b1fd86694c25beb57d813c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `localModelLean` synthesize Tool Search defaults when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, threads that runtime config through embedded tool/catalog construction, and updates focused tests plus local-model docs.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +82, Docs +2. Total +116 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows `localModelLean: true` with unset `tools.toolSearch` now receives generated Tool Search defaults. I did not reproduce the broader Windows/Ollama event-loop issue.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer draft changes compatibility-sensitive default semantics and overlaps another open PR, so the next step is a human product/upgrade decision rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- default `localModelLean` runs to structured Tool Search controls when the operator has not configured `tools.toolSearch`
- keep explicit Tool Search config authoritative, including `tools.toolSearch: false`
- document that lean mode now hides larger plugin/MCP/client catalogs behind `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, and `tool_call`

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599

## Verification

- Rebasing onto current `origin/main` completed on head `967cc13cbdf`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot`: passed, 2 shards / 68 tests.
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`: passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`: passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`: passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: passed, `provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_e0f0d2c0cbe9`, `run=run_0d4aa0185894`, exit 0; selected lanes `core`, `coreTests`, `docs`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: smaller/local-model runs can keep large extra tool catalogs out of the direct prompt surface without disabling tools entirely.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw gwt worktree and AWS Crabbox Linux changed-gate proof.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused lean-mode and embedded-attempt Vitest files, docs mdx, oxfmt, oxlint, diff-check, and `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --label local-model-lean-check-changed --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: local targeted tests passed 2 Vitest shards / 68 tests. AWS changed gate selected `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`, including core/core-test typecheck, full core lint, import-cycle checks, and guards.

Observed result after fix: lean-mode embedded runs enable Tool Search controls by default and pass the resolved Tool Search config into core, OpenClaw, MCP, and client catalog construction while preserving explicit operator config.

What was not tested: live Ollama model-family validation for the broader local-model issue.
target.author: vincentkoc
